zh.lifeSummary: 當Julliana de Monmouth於大約1210年出生在英國越可爾米費爾德時，她的父親Lord John de Monmouth29歲，母親Lady Maud de Huntington26歲。她於1227年與Alexander de Néville在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1271年在英國林可爾史爾享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Julliana de Monmouth于大约1210年出生在英国越可爾米費爾德时，她的父亲Lord John de Monmouth29岁，母亲Lady Maud de Huntington26岁。她于1227年与Alexander de Néville在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1271年在英国林可爾史爾享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Julliana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Julianus ( see Julian ), which was revived in England in the 18th century and has been used occasionally ever since.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Julliana de Monmouth was born about 1210, in Mirfield, Yorkshire, England, her father, Lord John de Monmouth, was 29 and her mother, Lady Maud de Huntington, was 26. She married Alexander de Néville in 1227, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. She died about 1271, in Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Julliana de Monmouth est née environ 1210, à Mirfield, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Lord John de Monmouth, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Lady Maud de Huntington, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Alexander de Néville en 1227, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1271, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Julliana de Monmouth um 1210 in Mirfield, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lord John de Monmouth 29 und ihre Mutter Lady Maud de Huntington 26. Sie hat 1227 in Yorkshire, England Alexander de Néville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Sie starb um 1271 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Julliana de Monmouthが約1210年にイギリスヨークシュアイアミルフィールドで生まれた時，父Lord John de Monmouthは29歳，母Lady Maud de Huntingtonは26歳であった。1227年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでAlexander de Névilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1271年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Julliana de Monmouth(이)가 대략 1210년 영국 요르크실르 미르필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord John de Monmouth(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Maud de Huntington(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1227년 영국 요르크실르에서 Alexander de Néville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1271년 영국 링코실르에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Alexander de Néville em 1227, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1271, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Julliana de Monmouth родилась около 1210 г. в местности мирфиелд, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Lord John de Monmouth было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Maud de Huntington, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander de Néville в 1227 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Она умерла около 1271 г. в местности линколншир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет.
